# Data Model Checklist: Provide Clear Error Messages for Invalid Inputs

**Purpose**: Ensure entities cover error responses and items.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/032-invalid-input-errors/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Error response includes status, error code, and errors array.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Error items include field, reason, and correction hint.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Error items include severity ordering.
